title: Rebecca's Father Is Revealed
description: Pages 11–15 focus on rebecca's father is revealed, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And they've al- so got huge bouties.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: As it is, they'll be making trips between the toy house and the underground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You guys stay in this box....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Prepare your- selves! I'm taking over this lift!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The "thunder soldier" of the colosseum!!! How'd he get in here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: Ehhh you hit me, Soldier-San!! That's Domestic Violence!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It's not like I want to hit you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: So then stop right before you do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: without any sense of danger, there can be no growth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Human instinct is an amazing thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Bring it out from within yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But Sol- Dier-san is a toy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I don't care about fighting anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I rust in the rain and wind....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I don't know when I'll reach my limit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: This body was not made to fight. After all, a toy... is something that may break before a child becomes an adult!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I could impart no- thing but strength to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: This guy!! How's He So Strong!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: What're you after!? What could a toy possibly want!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: So that my child may live a life of happen- mess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: And I'll give my life for that cause!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Return dress- Rosa to the King Riku's Family!!!

summary: Rebecca's Father Is Revealed focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.
